responsibilities: Design and validate thermal management systems for electronic and mechanical assemblies using CFD and FEA simulation tools
Develop detailed heat transfer models to predict component temperatures under steady-state and transient operating conditions
Conduct thermal testing and instrumentation of prototypes to correlate simulation results with empirical thermocouple and IR camera data
Optimize heatsink, cold plate, and vapor chamber designs to meet junction temperature and reliability requirements
Collaborate with mechanical, electrical, and systems engineers to integrate thermal solutions into overall product architecture
Author thermal design specifications, test reports, and engineering change requests for cross-functional review
Perform root-cause analysis on thermal failures and recommend corrective design modifications to extend product lifespan
Lead thermal risk assessments during design reviews to identify hotspots and mitigate overheating before production release
